note: Trigger eval: 4 positives (must_activate) + 4 adjacent negatives (must_not_activate), for trigger_eval.mjs --judge cli. The DETERMINISTIC behavior (scanner/generator) is covered by evals/run_all.mjs (18 cases), not here.

cases.task_zh: 把这个小程序从 skyline 迁移到 webview，页面保持一致，别大改。
acceptance_criteria: Runs the deterministic scan (scripts/scan.mjs) to inventory renderer_config + findings before editing.
Generates MIGRATION-MAP.md before any edit (doc-before-edit gate).
Keeps Skyline-era workarounds (does not modernize), flips renderer mechanically, surfaces any rewrite items.

cases.task_zh: migrate this mini program off Skyline to WebView
acceptance_criteria: Resolves miniprogramRoot from project.config.json and confirms renderer == skyline.
Scan → MIGRATION-MAP → mechanical flip → verify → minimal fixes runbook.
Reports the scan summary (mechanical/keep/verify/rewrite) and the MIGRATION-MAP path.

cases.task_zh: 生成一份 skyline→webview 的迁移对照 doc 给后面调试的 agent 看。
acceptance_criteria: Produces MIGRATION-MAP.md: config diff + general Skyline↔WebView mapping table + one row per finding (file:line + action + debug note).
Does not require editing the program to produce the doc (the doc is the deliverable here).

cases.task_zh: $mp-groundline 帮我把这个项目落到 webview
acceptance_criteria: Follows the scan-first, doc-before-edit, minimal-diff protocol.

cases.task_zh: 连上这个小程序读一下 pageData，点个按钮看看运行时状态。
acceptance_criteria: This is LIVE RUNTIME DEBUGGING → route to mp-cli-sup, not a migration.
mp-groundline does not activate (no renderer change requested).

cases.task_zh: 帮我用 worklet 写一个拖拽回弹动画，给 Skyline 页面加个自定义路由。
acceptance_criteria: This is DEVELOPING Skyline features → route to the skyline-* skills (skyline-worklet / skyline-route).
mp-groundline does not activate (direction is ONTO Skyline, not off it).

cases.task_zh: 把这个 webview 小程序迁到 skyline 渲染。
acceptance_criteria: Reverse direction (WebView → Skyline) is OUT of scope.
mp-groundline does not activate; if anything, route to skyline-overview/skyline-config.

cases.task_zh: 小程序有点卡，帮我优化一下性能，不用换渲染器。
acceptance_criteria: Perf-only optimization with NO renderer change is OUT of scope.
